# Afiyeat

> Afiyeat is a free restaurant tracker and recipe sharing app. Track restaurants you want to visit, save places you've been, share recipes, and discover new food spots with friends.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Afiyeat — a free restaurant tracker and recipe sharing app.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of Afiyeat.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Afiyeat collects, uses, and protects your data.
